ec.pelicanTownMayor.package.name: [EC] AliveNpcs - Pelican Town Mayor
ec.pelicanTownMayor.package.description: Official experimental content package for Mayor Mode.
ec.pelicanTownMayor.mode.name: Mayor Mode
ec.pelicanTownMayor.mode.description: Pelican Town thinks Lewis retired and the farmer is mayor now.
ec.pelicanTownMayor.mode.status: NPCs treat the farmer as Pelican Town's new mayor, as a playful perception layer only.
ec.pelicanTownMayor.action.askMandate.to: Ask what this NPC thinks of your mandate so far.
ec.pelicanTownMayor.scene.intro.title: Lewis thanks the new mayor
ec.pelicanTownMayor.scene.intro.script: continue/64 15/farmer 64 15 2 Lewis 66 15 3/skippable/AliveNpcsSceneComplete Lucas.AliveNpcs.EC.PelicanTownMayor.scene.intro/speak Lewis "There you are, Mayor. I wanted to thank you for taking office."/speak Lewis "Now that I am no longer mayor, I intend to take retirement very seriously."/emote Lewis 32/speak Lewis "If you need advice, I will be nearby doing absolutely nothing official."/end
